Lumify
Table of Contents

Class PresenceService

Namespace
lumify.api.Services
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

In-memory implementation of IPresenceService. Maintains the mapping between users and their open SignalR connections in thread-safe dictionaries; a user counts as online while at least one connection is registered.

public class PresenceService : IPresenceService
Inheritance
object
PresenceService
Implements
IPresenceService

Remarks

State is per-process and not persisted, so it resets on restart and is not shared across multiple server instances.

Methods

AddConnection(string, string)

Registers a new connection for a user, creating the user's connection set on first use.

public void AddConnection(string userID, string connectionID)

Parameters

userID string

The connecting user.

connectionID string

The new SignalR connection ID.

GetPresenceStatus(string)

Returns whether the user currently has any open connection.

public PresenceStatus GetPresenceStatus(string userID)

Parameters

userID string

The user to check.

Returns

PresenceStatus

Online if at least one connection is open, otherwise Offline.

RemoveConnection(string)

Removes a connection and, if it was the user's last one, drops the user from the online set.

public void RemoveConnection(string connectionID)

Parameters

connectionID string

The SignalR connection ID that closed.
